Title: n8n has an Authentication Bypass in its Chat Trigger Node
Description:
When the Chat Trigger node is configured with n8n User Auth authentication, the authentication check could be circumvented.
- This issue requires the Chat Trigger node to be configured with n8n User Auth authentication (non-default).
AffectedVersions: All versions before 1.123.22, all versions starting from 2.0.0 before 2.9.3, all versions starting from 2.10.0 before 2.10.1
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 1.123.22 before 2.0.0, all versions starting from 2.9.3 before 2.10.0, all versions starting from 2.10.1
